response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy requiring 15 years of experience, recognized AI expertise, and demonstrated AI products/platforms. The resume shows ~13-14 years of relevant industry experience, only recent and limited AI-adjacent work (MCP tooling at re:cinq since April 2025), and no track record of cloud/AI strategy leadership, advising strategic customers, or shipping recognized AI products at scale.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Demonstrated knowledge sharing through workshops, talks, and founding an open-source GIS platform
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products required for a Principal AI Strategy role
Lacks Director-level IC scope: no evidence of advising strategic customers or driving company-wide technical strategy
Limited cloud-platform depth (some AWS CDK) versus the deep cloud/AI fluency expected

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and products
No Director-level strategic IC track record
